name: massimal-machine-learning
description: Machine learning tools for hyperspectral images, developed as part of the Massimal research project.
source_name: MASSIMAL (UiT The Arctic University of Norway)

name: massipipe
description: Pipeline and library for processing hyperspectral images acquired with a Resonon Pika L imager. The pipeline was developed as part of the MASSIMAL project; "Mapping of Algae and Seagrass using Spectral Imaging and MAchine Learning".
source_name: MASSIMAL (UiT The Arctic University of Norway)

name: synaptus
description: A Matlab/Octave and Python toolbox for synthetic aperture ultrasound imaging
source_name: MASSIMAL (UiT The Arctic University of Norway)

name: face-tracking-water-gun
description: Arduino and Python code for a face tracking water gun, made from a webcam on a pan-tilt platform and a windshield wiper pump. Faces are detected using Haar cascades in OpenCV, and servos are controlled via an Arduino.
source_name: MASSIMAL (UiT The Arctic University of Norway)

name: massimal-dataset
description: Documentation and examples related to the MASSIMAL dataset.
source_name: MASSIMAL (UiT The Arctic University of Norway)

name: tide-tool-demo
description: A small example Python project which checks and visualizes Norwegian tide levels based on the Norwegian Mapping Authority's tide level API. The project is meant for educational purposes, demonstrating tools used in Python development.
source_name: MASSIMAL (UiT The Arctic University of Norway)

name: inf-1600-intro-ai
description: Collection of code and notebooks related to teaching INF-1600 Introduction to artificial intelligence at UiT the Arctic University of Norway.
source_name: MASSIMAL (UiT The Arctic University of Norway)

name: public_marimo_notebooks
description: Marimo notebooks exported to GitHub Pages using WebAssembly. Used for teaching, research and collaboration.
source_name: MASSIMAL (UiT The Arctic University of Norway)

name: massimal
description: A collection of code related to Massimal research project on drone hyperspectral imaging of underwater vegetation
source_name: MASSIMAL (UiT The Arctic University of Norway)

name: portfolio
description: CV and portfolio for Martin H. Skjelvareid
source_name: MASSIMAL (UiT The Arctic University of Norway)

name: 3d-imaging
description: A collection of code snippets related to 3D imaging.
source_name: MASSIMAL (UiT The Arctic University of Norway)

name: vidtransgeotag
description: Tools for generating georeferenced (geotagged) ground truth images by merging video and geolocation data streams
source_name: MASSIMAL (UiT The Arctic University of Norway)

name: mh-skjelvareid.github.io
description: Repository for hosting personal GitHub page.
